title: Fig. 1 in Two new Rhynchothorax sea spiders from Japan
author: Matsushita, Hiroki
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 1. New Rhynchothorax species described herein, fixed specimens; Rhynchothorax nopperabo sp. nov., female, holotype, ICHUM 8636 (a, c), and paratype ICHUM 8637 (b, after soft tissues dissolved for DNA extraction); Rhynchothorax monoceros sp. nov., female, holotype (d, e), ICHUM 8640. a, d. Habitus, dorsal view; b. palp first segment (arrow), ventral view; c, e. sexual pore (arrows) on second coxa of fourth leg (c, intentionally stained with black oil-based paint). Scale bars: 1 mm (a, d); 100 µm (b); 50 µm (c, e).
steps_raw: Fig. 1. Habitus, dorsal view; b. palp first segment (arrow), ventral view; c, e. sexual pore (arrows) on second coxa of fourth leg (c, intentionally stained with black oil-based paint). Scale bars: 1 mm (a, d); 100 µm (b); 50 µm (c, e).
